justification: The diff upgrades Spring Boot to 3.3.13 and Java to 21, and correctly removes deprecated `@Autowired` annotations in favor of constructor injection, but fails to adopt Java 21 idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads) and only partially updates deprecated properties (`spring.datasource.initialization-mode` -> `spring.sql.init.mode`). The Guava version bump is minimal and doesn't reflect modern practices.
